S.FORM: Volodymyr Zelensky I 1978 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Volodymyr Zelensky, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ukraine anini i ci Volodymyr Zelensky, patirengan a romi'ad i 2019 a miheca saka 20 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: b~vo~u…ĺo~u…¨~…ģjmjr *…ô…ĺ…ônskj i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~vo~u…ĺo~u…¨~…ģjmjr *…ô…ĺ…ônskj, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~u~ukrain…ô anini i ¶i b~vo~u…ĺo~u…¨~…ģjmjr *…ô…ĺ…ônskj, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Volodymyr Zelensky I 1978 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Volodymyr Zelensky, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Ukraine anini i ci Volodymyr Zelensky, patirengan a romi'ad i 2019 a miheca saka 20 folad saka 7 a romi'ad.
